summary: Deep parallel research into MS Word UI, features, visual design, and Electron implementation strategy
logs: Research complete — returning structured spec to main loop for synthesis & implementation.

controls.label: Paste
controls.tooltip: Paste content from the Clipboard. Dropdown offers Paste Options: Keep Source Formatting, Merge Formatting, Picture, Keep Text Only, and Paste Special / Set Default Paste.

controls.label: Cut
controls.tooltip: Remove the selection and put it on the Clipboard so you can paste it elsewhere.

controls.label: Copy
controls.tooltip: Put a copy of the selection on the Clipboard so you can paste it somewhere else.

controls.label: Format Painter
controls.tooltip: Copy formatting from one place and apply it to another. Double-click to apply to multiple selections.

controls.label: Clipboard
controls.tooltip: Dialog Box Launcher: opens the Clipboard task pane showing collected cut/copied items.

controls.label: Font
controls.tooltip: Change the font face. Editable combo box with live preview of installed fonts.

controls.label: Font Size
controls.tooltip: Change the size of your text. Editable combo box.

controls.label: Increase Font Size
controls.tooltip: Make the text a bit bigger.

controls.label: Decrease Font Size
controls.tooltip: Make the text a bit smaller.

controls.label: Change Case
controls.tooltip: Change all the selected text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Capitalize Each Word, or other capitalization.

controls.label: Clear All Formatting
controls.tooltip: Remove all formatting from the selection, leaving only plain text.

controls.label: Bold
controls.tooltip: Make your text bold.

controls.label: Italic
controls.tooltip: Italicize your text.

controls.label: Underline
controls.tooltip: Underline your text. Dropdown chooses underline style and color (single, double, dotted, etc.).

controls.label: Strikethrough
controls.tooltip: Draw a line through the middle of the selected text.

controls.label: Subscript
controls.tooltip: Type very small letters just below the line of text.

controls.label: Superscript
controls.tooltip: Type very small letters just above the line of text.

controls.label: Text Effects and Typography
controls.tooltip: Add visual effects such as shadow, glow, reflection, and outline. Also Number Styles, Ligatures, Stylistic Sets.

controls.label: Text Highlight Color
controls.tooltip: Make text look like it was marked with a highlighter pen. Dropdown picks the highlight color or No Color / Stop Highlighting.

controls.label: Font Color
controls.tooltip: Change the color of your text. Dropdown opens the color palette: Automatic, Theme Colors, Standard Colors, More Colors, Gradient.

controls.label: Font
controls.tooltip: Dialog Box Launcher: opens the Font dialog for detailed character formatting (effects, advanced spacing, OpenType).

controls.label: Bullets
controls.tooltip: Create a bulleted list. Dropdown shows the Bullet Library and Define New Bullet.

controls.label: Numbering
controls.tooltip: Create a numbered list. Dropdown shows the Numbering Library, Set Numbering Value, and Define New Number Format.

controls.label: Multilevel List
controls.tooltip: Create a multilevel list to organize items or create an outline. Includes Define New Multilevel List and Define New List Style.

controls.label: Decrease Indent
controls.tooltip: Move your paragraph closer to the margin.

controls.label: Increase Indent
controls.tooltip: Move your paragraph farther away from the margin.

controls.label: Sort
controls.tooltip: Arrange the current selection in alphabetical or numerical order.

controls.label: Show/Hide ¶
controls.tooltip: Show paragraph marks and other hidden formatting symbols.

controls.label: Align Left
controls.tooltip: Align your content to the left margin.

controls.label: Center
controls.tooltip: Center your content on the page.

controls.label: Align Right
controls.tooltip: Align your content to the right margin.

controls.label: Justify
controls.tooltip: Distribute your text evenly between the margins.

controls.label: Line and Paragraph Spacing
controls.tooltip: Choose how much space appears between lines of text or between paragraphs. Add/Remove Space Before/After Paragraph.

controls.label: Shading
controls.tooltip: Color the background behind the selected text or paragraph. Dropdown opens the color palette.

controls.label: Borders
controls.tooltip: Add or remove borders from your selection. Dropdown lists border edge options, Draw Table, View Gridlines, Borders and Shading.

controls.label: Paragraph
controls.tooltip: Dialog Box Launcher: opens the Paragraph dialog for indents, spacing, and line/page breaks.

controls.label: Styles Gallery
controls.tooltip: Apply a style (Normal, No Spacing, Heading 1, Heading 2, Title, etc.) for consistent formatting. Includes a scroll/More button to expand the gallery.

controls.label: Styles
controls.tooltip: Dialog Box Launcher: opens the Styles task pane listing all available styles with management options.

controls.label: Find
controls.tooltip: Find text or other content in the document. Dropdown: Find, Advanced Find, Go To.

controls.label: Replace
controls.tooltip: Search for text you'd like to change and replace it with something else.

controls.label: Select
controls.tooltip: Select text or objects in the document: Select All, Select Objects, Select All Text With Similar Formatting, Selection Pane.
items: Select All Text With Similar Formatting

controls.label: Dictate
controls.tooltip: Use your voice to type anywhere on your computer. Dropdown selects spoken language and dictation settings.

controls.label: Sensitivity
controls.tooltip: Apply a sensitivity label to classify and protect this document (requires Microsoft Purview / organizational policy).

controls.label: Editor
controls.tooltip: Check spelling, grammar, and refinements (clarity, conciseness) with the Editor pane.

controls.label: Add-ins
controls.tooltip: Quick access to installed Office Add-ins; opens the Get Add-ins store and My Add-ins list.

controls.label: Reuse Files
controls.tooltip: Find and reuse content from your existing files (Microsoft 365 cloud feature). May not appear on all builds.

controls.label: Cover Page
controls.tooltip: Add a stylish, fully formatted cover page from a gallery of designs (Built-in templates, Remove Current Cover Page).
items: Save Selection to Cover Page Gallery...

controls.label: Blank Page
controls.tooltip: Add a blank page anywhere in your document.

controls.label: Page Break
controls.tooltip: End the current page and move to the next one.

controls.label: Table
controls.tooltip: Insert a table. Use the grid to pick rows/columns, or Insert Table, Draw Table, Convert Text to Table, Excel Spreadsheet, Quick Tables.

controls.label: Pictures
controls.tooltip: Insert a picture from This Device, Stock Images, or Online Pictures.

controls.label: Shapes
controls.tooltip: Insert ready-made shapes such as rectangles, circles, arrows, lines, flowchart symbols, and callouts. Includes New Drawing Canvas.

controls.label: Icons
controls.tooltip: Insert an icon to visually communicate using symbols (opens the icon/stock content picker).

controls.label: 3D Models
controls.tooltip: Insert a 3D model to rotate and view from any angle. Dropdown: This Device, Stock 3D Models.

controls.label: SmartArt
controls.tooltip: Insert a SmartArt graphic to visually communicate information (lists, processes, cycles, hierarchies).

controls.label: Chart
controls.tooltip: Insert a chart to illustrate and compare data (Column, Line, Pie, Bar, etc.).

controls.label: Screenshot
controls.tooltip: Insert a picture of any open window or a clipping of a screen area (Available Windows, Screen Clipping).

controls.label: Get Add-ins
controls.tooltip: Browse and add Office Add-ins from the Office Store to extend Word's functionality.

controls.label: My Add-ins
controls.tooltip: Insert an add-in you already have. Dropdown lists your installed add-ins and See All.

controls.label: Online Video
controls.tooltip: Insert a video from an online source by pasting its address; play it directly in the document.

controls.label: Link
controls.tooltip: Create a link in your document for quick access to webpages and files. Dropdown: Insert Link, recent items.

controls.label: Bookmark
controls.tooltip: Create a bookmark to assign a name to a specific point in a document so you can link to it.

controls.label: Cross-reference
controls.tooltip: Refer to specific places in your document, such as headings, figures, and tables; updates automatically if content moves.

controls.label: Comment
controls.tooltip: Add a note or annotation about this part of the document.

controls.label: Header
controls.tooltip: Content in the top margin of each page. Built-in gallery, Edit Header, Remove Header, Save Selection to Header Gallery.

controls.label: Footer
controls.tooltip: Content in the bottom margin of each page. Built-in gallery, Edit Footer, Remove Footer, Save Selection to Footer Gallery.

controls.label: Page Number
controls.tooltip: Insert page numbers. Top of Page, Bottom of Page, Page Margins, Current Position, Format Page Numbers, Remove Page Numbers.

controls.label: Text Box
controls.tooltip: Add a text box that can be positioned anywhere on the page. Built-in gallery, Draw Text Box, Save Selection to Text Box Gallery.
items: Save Selection to Text Box Gallery...

controls.label: Quick Parts
controls.tooltip: Insert reusable pieces of content: AutoText, Document Property, Field, Building Blocks Organizer, Save Selection to Quick Part Gallery.
items: Save Selection to Quick Part Gallery...

controls.label: WordArt
controls.tooltip: Insert decorative text. Pick a WordArt style from the gallery.

controls.label: Drop Cap
controls.tooltip: Create a large capital letter at the beginning of a paragraph. None, Dropped, In Margin, Drop Cap Options.

controls.label: Signature Line
controls.tooltip: Insert a signature line that specifies who must sign. Dropdown: Microsoft Office Signature Line, Add Signature Services.

controls.label: Date & Time
controls.tooltip: Quickly add the current date or time, optionally as a field that updates automatically.

controls.label: Object
controls.tooltip: Insert an embedded object (e.g., another document or spreadsheet). Dropdown: Object, Text from File.

controls.label: Equation
controls.tooltip: Add common mathematical equations or build your own with the equation tools. Dropdown: built-in equation gallery, Insert New Equation, Ink Equation.

controls.label: Symbol
controls.tooltip: Insert symbols and special characters not on your keyboard. Recently used symbols, More Symbols.

controls.label: Select Objects
controls.tooltip: Select ink, shapes, and text areas so you can move or resize them.

controls.label: Lasso Select
controls.tooltip: Select ink by drawing a circle around it, instead of selecting word by word.

controls.label: Eraser
controls.tooltip: Erase ink strokes. Click the arrow to choose Stroke Eraser, Small/Medium/Large Eraser, or Segment Eraser.

controls.label: Pens Gallery
controls.tooltip: Gallery of ink pens, pencils, and highlighters. Click a pen once to select it; click again to set its Thickness, Color, and Effects (Rainbow, Galaxy, Gold, etc.).

controls.label: Add Pen
controls.tooltip: Add a new Pen, Pencil, Highlighter, or Action pen to the gallery.

controls.label: Draw with Trackpad
controls.tooltip: Use the trackpad to draw ink when you do not have a touchscreen or pen.

controls.label: Drawing
controls.tooltip: Toggle ink drawing mode on or off (Draw with Touch / Draw Ink).

controls.label: Ink to Shape
controls.tooltip: Automatically convert ink drawings into clean geometric shapes as you draw.

controls.label: Ink to Math
controls.tooltip: Convert a handwritten mathematical expression into a typeset equation.

controls.label: Drawing Canvas
controls.tooltip: Insert a drawing canvas to help arrange and keep parts of a drawing together.

controls.label: Ink Replay
controls.tooltip: Replay your ink strokes in the order they were drawn; pause and play to review.

controls.label: Themes
controls.tooltip: Change the overall design of the entire document, including colors, fonts, and effects.

controls.label: Style Set
controls.tooltip: Gallery of built-in style sets (heading and body styling). Includes Reset to the Default Style Set and Save as a New Style Set.
items: Reset to the Default Style Set
Save as a New Style Set...

controls.label: Colors
controls.tooltip: Change the colors for the current theme.

controls.label: Fonts
controls.tooltip: Change the fonts for the current theme (heading and body font pairs).

controls.label: Paragraph Spacing
controls.tooltip: Quickly change the line and paragraph spacing for the whole document.

controls.label: Effects
controls.tooltip: Change the effects for the current theme (shadows, reflections, etc. for shapes).

controls.label: Set as Default
controls.tooltip: Use this document's formatting as the default for all new documents.

controls.label: Watermark
controls.tooltip: Insert ghosted text behind the content, such as Confidential or Draft.

controls.label: Page Color
controls.tooltip: Choose a color for the background of the page.

controls.label: Page Borders
controls.tooltip: Add or change the border around the page (opens the Borders and Shading dialog).

controls.label: Margins
controls.tooltip: Set the margin sizes for the entire document or current section.

controls.label: Orientation
controls.tooltip: Switch the pages between portrait and landscape layouts.

controls.label: Size
controls.tooltip: Choose a paper size for the document.

controls.label: Columns
controls.tooltip: Split text into two or more columns.

controls.label: Breaks
controls.tooltip: Add page, column, text-wrapping, or section breaks to the document.

controls.label: Line Numbers
controls.tooltip: Add line numbers in the margin alongside each line of the document.

controls.label: Hyphenation
controls.tooltip: Turn on hyphenation to break words between lines at the end of a line.

controls.label: Indent Left
controls.tooltip: Set the amount of space the paragraph is indented from the left margin.

controls.label: Indent Right
controls.tooltip: Set the amount of space the paragraph is indented from the right margin.

controls.label: Spacing Before
controls.tooltip: Change the amount of space above the selected paragraphs.

controls.label: Spacing After
controls.tooltip: Change the amount of space below the selected paragraphs.

controls.label: Position
controls.tooltip: Position the selected object on the page; text wraps around it automatically.

controls.label: Wrap Text
controls.tooltip: Choose how text wraps around the selected object.

controls.label: Bring Forward
controls.tooltip: Bring the selected object forward one level or in front of all other objects.

controls.label: Send Backward
controls.tooltip: Send the selected object back one level or behind all other objects.

controls.label: Selection Pane
controls.tooltip: Show the Selection pane to list, select, show, and hide objects on the page.

controls.label: Align
controls.tooltip: Align the edges of multiple selected objects, or distribute them evenly.

controls.label: Group
controls.tooltip: Group objects together so they are treated as a single object.

controls.label: Rotate
controls.tooltip: Rotate or flip the selected object.

controls.label: Table of Contents
controls.tooltip: Add a table of contents generated from the document's heading styles.
items: Save Selection to Table of Contents Gallery...

controls.label: Add Text
controls.tooltip: Add the current paragraph as an entry in the table of contents at a chosen level.
items: Do Not Show in Table of Contents

controls.label: Update Table
controls.tooltip: Update the table of contents so all entries refer to the correct page numbers.

controls.label: Insert Footnote
controls.tooltip: Add a footnote, automatically numbered, at the bottom of the page.

controls.label: Insert Endnote
controls.tooltip: Add an endnote, automatically numbered, at the end of the document.

controls.label: Next Footnote
controls.tooltip: Navigate to the next footnote. Click the arrow for Previous Footnote, Next/Previous Endnote.

controls.label: Show Notes
controls.tooltip: Scroll the document to show where the footnotes or endnotes are located.

controls.label: Search
controls.tooltip: Open the Search pane (Smart Lookup) to find related material from online sources.

controls.label: Researcher
controls.tooltip: Explore material related to your topic and add it and its sources to your document.

controls.label: Insert Citation
controls.tooltip: Cite a source by adding a citation; choose an existing source or add a new one.

controls.label: Manage Sources
controls.tooltip: Organize the list of sources cited in the document (Source Manager).

controls.label: Style
controls.tooltip: Choose the citation style to use, such as APA, MLA, or Chicago.

controls.label: Bibliography
controls.tooltip: Add a bibliography listing all sources cited in the document.

controls.label: Insert Caption
controls.tooltip: Add a caption (a numbered label such as Figure 1) to a picture or other object.

controls.label: Insert Table of Figures
controls.tooltip: Insert a table of figures listing captioned objects and their page numbers.

controls.label: Update Table
controls.tooltip: Update the table of figures to include all captioned entries in the document.

controls.label: Cross-reference
controls.tooltip: Refer to a numbered item, heading, figure, or table elsewhere in the document.

controls.label: Mark Entry
controls.tooltip: Include the selected text in the document's index.

controls.label: Insert Index
controls.tooltip: Add an index listing keywords and the page numbers where they appear.

controls.label: Update Index
controls.tooltip: Update the index so all entries point to the correct page numbers.

controls.label: Mark Citation
controls.tooltip: Add the selected text (such as a legal case) to the table of authorities.

controls.label: Insert Table of Authorities
controls.tooltip: Add a table of authorities listing cases, statutes, and other cited authorities.

controls.label: Update Table
controls.tooltip: Update the table of authorities to include all marked citations.

controls.label: Envelopes
controls.tooltip: Create and print envelopes. You can choose the envelope size, formatting, and printing options.

controls.label: Labels
controls.tooltip: Create and print labels. Choose from a number of popular label styles and shapes.

controls.label: Start Mail Merge
controls.tooltip: Create one document and send it to multiple people. Choose Letters, E-mail Messages, Envelopes, Labels, Directory, Normal Word Document, or the Step-by-Step Mail Merge Wizard.

controls.label: Select Recipients
controls.tooltip: Choose the list of people you want to send the document to. Type a new list, use an existing one, or choose Outlook contacts.

controls.label: Edit Recipient List
controls.tooltip: Make changes to the list of recipients and decide which of them receive your letter. You can sort, filter, find, and remove duplicates.

controls.label: Highlight Merge Fields
controls.tooltip: Highlight the fields you've inserted in the document so you can easily spot the parts of your letter that will be replaced with information from your recipient list.

controls.label: Address Block
controls.tooltip: Add an address to your letter. You specify the formatting and location, and Word replaces it with actual addresses from your recipient list when you finish the mail merge.

controls.label: Greeting Line
controls.tooltip: Add a greeting line such as 'Dear Mr. Smith' to your document.

controls.label: Insert Merge Field
controls.tooltip: Add any field from your recipient list to the document, such as Last Name, Home Phone, Company Name, or any other field.

controls.label: Rules
controls.tooltip: Specify rules to add decision-making ability to the mail merge (e.g., If...Then...Else, Fill-in, Ask, Skip Record If, Next Record).

controls.label: Match Fields
controls.tooltip: Tell Word the meaning of different fields in your recipient list. Match the fields with standard names that Word recognizes (e.g., First Name, Last Name, Address).

controls.label: Update Labels
controls.tooltip: If you're creating labels, update all the labels in the document to use the information from the recipient list. (Available only for label merges.)

controls.label: Preview Results
controls.tooltip: See your document with the merge fields replaced by actual data from your recipient list, so you can check the way it looks.

controls.label: First Record
controls.tooltip: Preview the first record in your recipient list.

controls.label: Previous Record
controls.tooltip: Preview the previous record in your recipient list.

controls.label: Go to Record
controls.tooltip: Type the number of the record you'd like to preview, or use the arrows to move to the next or previous record.

controls.label: Next Record
controls.tooltip: Preview the next record in your recipient list.

controls.label: Last Record
controls.tooltip: Preview the last record in your recipient list.

controls.label: Find Recipient
controls.tooltip: Find and preview a specific record in your recipient list by searching for text.

controls.label: Check for Errors
controls.tooltip: Specify how to handle errors that occur when completing the mail merge. You can also simulate the merge to see what errors might happen.

controls.label: Finish & Merge
controls.tooltip: Complete the mail merge. You can edit individual copies of the document, print them, or send them as e-mail messages.

controls.label: Editor
controls.tooltip: Check your document for spelling, grammar, and writing style suggestions. (In Microsoft 365 this is the Editor pane; classic Spelling & Grammar in Word 2021.)

controls.label: Spelling and Grammar
controls.tooltip: Check the spelling and grammar of text in the document.

controls.label: Thesaurus
controls.tooltip: Find other words with the same meaning (synonyms) for the word you've selected.

controls.label: Word Count
controls.tooltip: Find out the number of words, characters, paragraphs, and lines in the document. You can also find the number of pages.

controls.label: Read Aloud
controls.tooltip: Have your text read aloud while it highlights each word so you can check the text or just listen to your document.

controls.label: Check Accessibility
controls.tooltip: Find and fix accessibility issues to make your content easier for people with disabilities to access.

controls.label: Translate
controls.tooltip: Easily translate selected text or your whole document into a different language using Microsoft Translator.

controls.label: Language
controls.tooltip: Choose the language settings for proofing tools and editing.

controls.label: New Comment
controls.tooltip: Add a note about this part of the document. Select the content you want to comment on, then click here.

controls.label: Delete
controls.tooltip: Delete the selected comment, or delete all comments in the document.

controls.label: Previous
controls.tooltip: Jump to the previous comment in the document.

controls.label: Next
controls.tooltip: Jump to the next comment in the document.

controls.label: Show Comments
controls.tooltip: Choose to see all comments contextually alongside the text, or show them in a list pane.

controls.label: Display for Review
controls.tooltip: Choose how you want to view changes to the document: Simple Markup, All Markup, No Markup, or Original.

controls.label: Filter All Markup
controls.tooltip: Filter the markup shown in the document.

controls.label: Show Markup
controls.tooltip: Choose what kind of markup to show in your document, such as insertions and deletions, formatting, and which reviewers to display.

controls.label: Reviewing Pane
controls.tooltip: Show revisions in a separate window, vertically or horizontally. This is a handy way to make sure that all tracked changes have been removed from your document.

controls.label: Track Changes Options
controls.tooltip: Dialog Box Launcher: opens the Track Changes Options dialog.

controls.label: Track Changes
controls.tooltip: Keep track of all the changes made to the document, including insertions, deletions, and formatting changes.

controls.label: Accept
controls.tooltip: Keep this change and move to the next one. Use the dropdown to accept and move to next, accept all changes, accept all and stop tracking, or accept all changes shown.
items: Accept All Changes and Stop Tracking

controls.label: Reject
controls.tooltip: Reject this change and move to the next one. Use the dropdown to reject all changes or reject all and stop tracking.
items: Reject All Changes and Stop Tracking

controls.label: Previous
controls.tooltip: Jump to the previous tracked change in the document so you can accept or reject it.

controls.label: Next
controls.tooltip: Jump to the next tracked change in the document so you can accept or reject it.

controls.label: Compare
controls.tooltip: Compare or combine multiple versions of a document.

controls.label: Block Authors
controls.tooltip: Block other authors from making changes to the text you've selected. (Available for documents stored on SharePoint / OneDrive for shared editing.)

controls.label: Restrict Editing
controls.tooltip: Limit how much others can edit or format the document. Restrict formatting to a selection of styles, and control the kinds of editing changes that can be made.

controls.label: Hide Ink
controls.tooltip: Hide or show ink annotations in the document. (Appears when the document contains ink or on touch/pen-enabled devices.)

controls.label: Read Mode
controls.tooltip: Read documents comfortably in a view designed to fit your screen. Hides most toolbars and lets you swipe between pages.

controls.label: Print Layout
controls.tooltip: See the document the way it will look on the printed page. This is the default view.

controls.label: Web Layout
controls.tooltip: See how your document would look as a webpage. Text wraps to fit the window and graphics are positioned as in a browser.

controls.label: Outline
controls.tooltip: See your document in outline form, where content is shown as bulleted points. This view is useful for creating headings and moving whole paragraphs within the document.

controls.label: Draft
controls.tooltip: See your document as a simple draft, for quickly editing text. Certain elements such as headers and footers won't be visible.

controls.label: Focus
controls.tooltip: Focus on your document by hiding the ribbon and other on-screen elements, leaving just your content on a dark background.

controls.label: Immersive Reader
controls.tooltip: Open a focused reading experience that lets you adjust text spacing, column width, page color, line focus, syllables, and read aloud.

controls.label: Vertical
controls.tooltip: Flip pages vertically by scrolling up and down. This is the default page movement.

controls.label: Side to Side
controls.tooltip: Flip pages horizontally from one side to the other, like turning pages in a book.

controls.label: Ruler
controls.tooltip: Show the rulers next to your document so you can measure and line things up.

controls.label: Gridlines
controls.tooltip: Turn on gridlines to line up objects in your document. The gridlines won't be printed.

controls.label: Navigation Pane
controls.tooltip: Open the Navigation Pane to move around the document by heading, page, or by searching for text or objects.

controls.label: Zoom
controls.tooltip: Choose a zoom level for the document. In most cases, you can use the zoom controls in the status bar to do the same thing.
Zoom the document to 100% of the normal size.

controls.label: One Page
controls.tooltip: Zoom the document so that an entire page fits in the window.

controls.label: Multiple Pages
controls.tooltip: Zoom the document so that two or more pages fit in the window at once.

controls.label: Page Width
controls.tooltip: Zoom the document so that the width of the page matches the width of the window.

controls.label: New Window
controls.tooltip: Open a second window for the document so you can work in different places at the same time.

controls.label: Arrange All
controls.tooltip: Stack your open windows so you can see all of them at once.

controls.label: Split
controls.tooltip: View two sections of your document at the same time. This is helpful for seeing one part while editing another.

controls.label: View Side by Side
controls.tooltip: View two documents side by side so you can compare their contents.

controls.label: Synchronous Scrolling
controls.tooltip: Scroll two documents at the same time. This is a great way to compare documents line by line. (Enabled with View Side by Side.)

controls.label: Reset Window Position
controls.tooltip: Place the documents you're comparing side by side so they share the screen equally. (Enabled with View Side by Side.)

controls.label: Switch Windows
controls.tooltip: Switch quickly to another open window. The dropdown lists all currently open documents.

controls.label: Macros
controls.tooltip: View the list of macros, from which you can run, create, or delete a macro. The dropdown offers View Macros, Record Macro, and Pause Recording.

controls.label: Properties
controls.tooltip: View and edit the SharePoint document properties for this file. (This group appears only when the document is stored in a SharePoint library.)

controls.label: Help
controls.tooltip: Get help using Word. Browse help articles and search for answers to your questions.

controls.label: Contact Support
controls.tooltip: Contact Microsoft Support to get help with a problem.

controls.label: Feedback
controls.tooltip: Tell Microsoft what you like and don't like, and suggest new features. Opens the Feedback page in the File menu (Backstage).

controls.label: Show Training
controls.tooltip: Watch training videos and learn how to get the most out of Word.

controls.label: What's New
controls.tooltip: See what's new and improved in recent updates to Word.

controls.tooltip: Creates a new empty document

controls.tooltip: Featured template cards shown on Home

controls.tooltip: Requires a hosted template service / online catalog

controls.tooltip: Quick filters: Business, Cards, Flyers, Letters, Education, Resumes

controls.tooltip: Preview then create from a template

controls.tooltip: Interactive welcome/tour content

controls.tooltip: Recent files and folders

controls.tooltip: Pinned recent files/folders

controls.label: Shared with Me
controls.tooltip: Requires cloud account/sharing

controls.tooltip: Needs cloud storage integration

controls.tooltip: Browse local folders

controls.label: Add a Place
controls.tooltip: Connect additional storage services

controls.label: Browse
controls.tooltip: Open native file picker dialog

controls.label: Recover Unsaved Documents
controls.tooltip: Open autosave/temp recovery location

controls.tooltip: Current file name and path

controls.tooltip: Mark as Final feasible; encryption/IRM/signatures need crypto backend

controls.tooltip: Autosave version history needs versioning store

controls.label: Properties panel
controls.tooltip: Size, pages, words, editing time, title, tags, comments

controls.label: Advanced Properties / Show All Properties
controls.tooltip: Expand full metadata fields

controls.tooltip: Last modified, created, last printed

controls.label: Related People
controls.tooltip: Author add/edit; presence info needs identity service

controls.tooltip: Cloud version history requires sync backend

controls.label: Save (to current location)
controls.tooltip: Save changes to the existing file

controls.label: Recent folders
controls.tooltip: Recently used save locations

controls.tooltip: Requires cloud storage integration
